subject: english
description: 接続詞は文と文、語と語をつなぐ語です。

questions.question: I play games ___ study English. (選択)
questions.explanation: 選択を表すには or を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ they are fun. (理由)
questions.explanation: 理由を表すには because を使います

questions.question: I play games, ___ I don't play every day. (逆接)
questions.explanation: 逆接を表すには but を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ I finish homework. (時)
questions.explanation: 後にする場合は after を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ I have time. (条件)
questions.explanation: 条件を表すには if を使います

questions.question: I like cats ___ dogs. (並列)
questions.explanation: 並列を表すには and を使います

questions.question: I was tired, ___ I went to bed early. (理由)
questions.explanation: 結果を表すには so を使います

questions.question: ___ I was tired, I studied hard. (逆接)
questions.explanation: 逆接を表すには Although を使います
